title: Independent Commission for Aid Impact's review of UK aid to Sudan: UK government response
body: "This document provides the UK government response to the Independent Commission for Aid Impact’s review of UK aid to Sudan.  The Government welcomes the Independent Commission for Aid Impact’s (ICAI) review of UK aid to Sudan from 2019 to 2025. We are pleased that the report recognises the UK’s sustained commitment to Sudan, our international leadership and diplomacy as well as our leadership in the humanitarian response.    The Government acknowledges the findings of the review and accepts the recommendations in full, which are in line with our own priorities and in line with our continued commitment to the people of Sudan.  "
